primary_official_source.name: EUR-Lex — Official Journal of the European Union

published: ISO/IEC 5259-1:2024 — Data quality for analytics and ML
ISO/IEC TR 24027:2021 — Bias in AI systems
upcoming: CEN-CENELEC harmonized standard for Art. 10 (expected Q4 2026)

obligations.source_quote: High-risk AI systems which make use of techniques involving the training of AI models with data shall be developed on the basis of training, validation and testing data sets that meet the quality criteria referred to in paragraphs 2 to 5 whenever such data sets are used.

decomposed_atoms.description: Training/validation/testing data must meet quality criteria
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Systems SHALL be developed on data sets meeting quality criteria of paragraphs 2-5

decomposed_atoms.description: Training, validation AND testing sets all subject to requirements
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Quality criteria SHALL apply to training, validation, AND testing data sets

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for dataset documentation files (data_card.md, datasheet.*, data_governance.*, dataset_card.*)
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether datasets actually meet quality criteria requires domain expertise
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect presence of data documentation but cannot assess data quality

obligations.source_quote: Training, validation and testing data sets shall be subject to data governance and management practices appropriate for the intended purpose of the high-risk AI system.

decomposed_atoms.description: Data governance and management practices must exist
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data sets SHALL be subject to appropriate data governance practices

decomposed_atoms.description: Art.10(2)(a): relevant design choices documented
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Practices SHALL concern relevant design choices

decomposed_atoms.description: Art.10(2)(b): data collection processes and origin documented
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Practices SHALL concern data collection processes and origin of data

decomposed_atoms.description: Art.10(2)(c): data preparation operations documented
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Practices SHALL concern relevant data-preparation processing operations (annotation, labelling, cleaning, updating, enrichment, aggregation)

decomposed_atoms.description: Art.10(2)(d): assumptions formulated
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Practices SHALL concern the formulation of assumptions about what data are supposed to measure and represent

decomposed_atoms.description: Art.10(2)(e): data availability/quantity/suitability assessed
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Practices SHALL concern an assessment of availability, quantity and suitability of data sets

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for dedicated data pipeline/preprocessing files (preprocess.*, data_clean.*, data_pipeline.*, etl.*, feature_engineering.*)
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether all 6 sub-requirements (a-e) are adequately covered
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect data pipeline code and documentation but cannot assess completeness of governance practices

obligations.source_quote: examination in view of possible biases that are likely to affect the health and safety of persons, have a negative impact on fundamental rights or lead to discrimination prohibited under Union law, especially where data outputs influence inputs for future operations;

decomposed_atoms.description: Biases must be examined
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Provider SHALL examine data for possible biases affecting health, safety, fundamental rights, or causing prohibited discrimination

decomposed_atoms.description: Feedback loop bias must be checked
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Bias examination SHALL especially consider where data outputs influence inputs for future operations (feedback loops)

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for bias detection framework imports (fairlearn, aif360, aequitas, what_if_tool, responsibleai, fairness_indicators) in source code and dependencies
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether bias examination is adequate for the specific domain and protected categories
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect bias detection tooling but cannot assess examination thoroughness

obligations.source_quote: appropriate measures to detect, prevent and mitigate possible biases identified according to point (f);

decomposed_atoms.description: Measures to detect biases
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Provider SHALL implement measures to detect biases identified in (f)

decomposed_atoms.description: Measures to prevent biases
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Provider SHALL implement measures to prevent biases

decomposed_atoms.description: Measures to mitigate biases
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Provider SHALL implement measures to mitigate biases that cannot be prevented

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for bias mitigation code patterns (resampling, reweighting, adversarial debiasing, fairness constraints, demographic parity enforcement)
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether mitigation measures are appropriate and effective
automation_assessment.rationale: Can detect bias mitigation code but cannot assess effectiveness

obligations.source_quote: the identification of relevant data gaps or shortcomings that prevent compliance with this Regulation, and how those gaps and shortcomings can be addressed.

decomposed_atoms.description: Data gaps must be identified
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Provider SHALL identify relevant data gaps or shortcomings

decomposed_atoms.description: How to address gaps must be documented
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Provider SHALL document how identified gaps and shortcomings can be addressed

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for data gap analysis in documentation, known limitations sections
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether all relevant data gaps have been identified and remediation plans are adequate
automation_assessment.rationale: Data gap identification requires domain expertise beyond code analysis

obligations.source_quote: Training, validation and testing data sets shall be relevant, sufficiently representative, and to the best extent possible, free of errors and complete in view of the intended purpose.

decomposed_atoms.description: Data must be relevant to intended purpose
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data sets SHALL be relevant in view of the intended purpose

decomposed_atoms.description: Data must be sufficiently representative
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data sets SHALL be sufficiently representative

decomposed_atoms.description: Data must be free of errors (best effort)
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data sets SHALL be free of errors to the best extent possible

decomposed_atoms.description: Data must be complete for intended purpose
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data sets SHALL be complete in view of the intended purpose

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for data quality validation scripts, error checking in data pipeline, completeness assertions
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether data is truly representative, complete, and error-free requires domain expertise
automation_assessment.rationale: Data quality is highly context-dependent and cannot be fully assessed from code

obligations.source_quote: They shall have the appropriate statistical properties, including, where applicable, as regards the persons or groups of persons in relation to whom the high-risk AI system is intended to be used.

decomposed_atoms.description: Data must have appropriate statistical properties
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data sets SHALL have appropriate statistical properties for the intended use

decomposed_atoms.description: Data must represent relevant persons/groups
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Statistical properties SHALL include representation of persons or groups the system is intended to be used on

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for statistical analysis of dataset distributions, demographic breakdowns, stratification documentation
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether statistical properties are appropriate for the specific use case

obligations.source_quote: Those characteristics of the data sets may be met at the level of individual data sets or at the level of a combination thereof.
obligations.note: Flexibility permission: providers may satisfy representativeness and statistical property requirements either at individual dataset level or across a combination of datasets. Not an obligation.

decomposed_atoms.description: Requirements may be met at individual dataset level
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data set characteristics MAY be met by each individual data set

decomposed_atoms.description: Requirements may be met at combined dataset level
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data set characteristics MAY be met by a combination of data sets taken together

automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether the combination of datasets together satisfies representativeness requirements
automation_assessment.rationale: Permission (may), not obligation — dataset combination assessment requires domain expertise

obligations.source_quote: Data sets shall take into account, to the extent required by the intended purpose, the characteristics or elements that are particular to the specific geographical, contextual, behavioural or functional setting within which the high-risk AI system is intended to be used.

decomposed_atoms.description: Geographic setting considered
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data SHALL account for geographical setting particularities

decomposed_atoms.description: Contextual setting considered
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data SHALL account for contextual setting particularities

decomposed_atoms.description: Behavioural setting considered
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data SHALL account for behavioural setting particularities

decomposed_atoms.description: Functional setting considered
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Data SHALL account for functional setting particularities

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for deployment context documentation, geographic coverage analysis, user behavior analysis
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether deployment context has been adequately considered in data selection
automation_assessment.rationale: Deployment context adequacy requires understanding of specific use case

obligations.source_quote: To the extent that it is strictly necessary for the purpose of ensuring bias detection and correction in relation to the high-risk AI systems in accordance with paragraph (2), points (f) and (g) of this Article, the providers of such systems may exceptionally process special categories of personal data, subject to appropriate safeguards for the fundamental rights and freedoms of natural persons.
obligations.note: Conditional permission with 6 mandatory conditions (a-f). Only applies when processing special category personal data for bias detection.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies when processing special categories of personal data for bias detection/correction

decomposed_atoms.description: Processing must be strictly necessary for bias detection
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Special category data processing MAY occur only when strictly necessary for bias detection/correction

decomposed_atoms.description: Appropriate safeguards must be in place
decomposed_atoms.requirement: Processing SHALL include appropriate safeguards for fundamental rights

automation_assessment.detection_method: Check for special category data processing code, GDPR compliance documentation
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether processing is strictly necessary and safeguards are adequate
automation_assessment.rationale: Necessity and safeguard assessment requires legal expertise

obligations.source_quote: For the development of high-risk AI systems not using techniques involving the training of AI models, paragraphs 2 to 5 apply only to the testing data sets.
obligations.scope_limitation: Only applies to systems not using training techniques (rule-based, expert systems)

decomposed_atoms.description: For non-training systems, requirements apply only to test data
decomposed_atoms.requirement: For systems not using training, paragraphs 2-5 SHALL apply only to testing data sets

automation_assessment.detection_method: Determine if system uses training techniques or is rule-based/expert system
automation_assessment.human_judgment_needed: Whether the system uses training techniques
automation_assessment.rationale: Distinguishing training-based from rule-based requires understanding system architecture

scope_notes.general_obligations: ART10-OBL-1 through ART10-OBL-4 — apply to ALL high-risk AI systems using training data
scope_notes.conditional: ART10-PERM-5 — permission for special category data processing with 6 conditions
scope_notes.scope_rule: ART10-OBL-6 — non-training systems: only testing data subject to requirements
